text.title: Cost-Model Spreadsheet Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the structure of the deliverable cost-model spreadsheet. Submitting an ADR without this artifact is incomplete; the artifact's shape is the contract.

list.item: Assumptions — named cells for: req_per_sec_peak, req_per_sec_avg, storage_growth_GB_month, multi_az_yes_no, region_primary, region_secondary, traffic_split_internal_vs_internet.
Lines — one row per line item; columns: category, line_name, region, unit, monthly_volume, monthly_volume_source, unit_cost, unit_cost_source_url, monthly_cost, notes.
Summary — subtotal per category, total, buffer (with policy note), grand-total.
Scenarios — three columns (Conservative / Expected / Aggressive) derived from Lines with volume multipliers from Assumptions.
SignOff — architect name + date, budget-owner name + date, ADR ref.
Compute — instances (per type), autoscaling overhead, spot/savings-plan effective rate.
Storage — block (per type), object, backup tiers, snapshot retention.
Network — egress to internet, NAT gateway data-processing, public IPs, VPC endpoints, inter-AZ data transfer.
Operations — log ingest, log storage, metrics, traces, KMS requests, Secrets Manager, certificates.
Backup & DR — cross-region replication, snapshot retention, restore-test runs.
Third-party — SaaS subs (Datadog, Sentry, etc.) explicitly included if billed against this architecture.

antipattern.description: Lines tab has fewer than 20 rows for a non-trivial multi-cloud architecture.
antipattern.reason: Suggests entire categories were dropped (typically Operations or Network). Violates r1.
Violates r5. The model is hiding gaps under a buffer.
Violates r4. Decision-makers cannot stress-test the proposal.

antipattern.description: monthly_volume_source column blank for >= 20% of lines.

list.item: All required tabs present and populated.
All line categories appear with at least one row (zero allowed with note).
Volume source links to Assumptions tab.
Unit-cost sources cite per-cloud-rates files OR provider calculator URLs.
SignOff tab populated by named architect + named budget owner.
